task: Add text gate for edu tier3 free-tier candidate quality

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real evidence and residual risk reporting when production quality checks remain.
Code changes require completion evidence, real runtime verification, and deployment source-of-truth discipline.

problem: Free-tier samples after key registration showed 0 refined and 25 skipped candidates because the backlog runner selected general education/news/blog items without an explicit AI or digital education signal.
fix: Both edu tier3 runners now default to a curated source allowlist, an AI/digital education text gate, a K-12/parent/student audience gate over title plus summary, and a small deny gate for institution PR/noisy education items. --no-text-gate remains available for emergency full-backlog processing.

verification.name: macmini text gate preview
verification.command: query pending edu_consulting candidates with AI/digital education ILIKE gate
verification.result: preview showed 2640 gated pending candidates; top candidates shifted from general education/blog items to AI education, AI career, and EdWeek AI policy items

verification.name: macmini text gate sample before deny gate
verification.result: pass: SQL gate executed in production and runner completed 정제 3 / 스킵 7 / 실패 0; all 10 sampled ids were saved, but institution PR false positives remained

verification.name: candidate gate unit tests after deny gate
macmini free launchd first run before audience gate
verification.result: residual risk found: first RunAtLoad completed 정제 16 / 스킵 24 / 실패 0, so launchd was booted out before the next hourly run and audience gate was added

verification.name: macmini audience gate preview
verification.command: query pending edu_consulting candidates with AI/digital gate, K-12/parent/student audience gate, and deny gate
verification.result: preview showed 400 gated pending candidates with top items focused on 자녀교육, 중학생, 학부모, AI classrooms, and student career guidance

verification.name: macmini audience gate sample
verification.result: residual risk: completed 정제 3 / 스킵 7 / 실패 0. The gate is safe but still too noisy for unattended launchd.

verification.name: macmini curated source allowlist preview
verification.command: query pending edu_consulting candidates with source allowlist plus text/audience/deny gates
verification.result: preview showed 42 pending candidates, led by EdWeek, Brunch AI education for parents, GoogleNews digital dependence, and parent/child smartphone items

verification.name: candidate gate unit tests after source allowlist

remaining_verification: After commit, push, and official Mac Mini deploy, run --free-tier --limit 10 with the curated source allowlist and confirm skip rate below 50 percent before re-enabling launchd.
